notes: Uzbekistan reported no injury concerns heading into the match, fielding a full-strength squad led by captain Eldor Shomurodov and Abbosbek Fayzullaev under Fabio Cannavaro's 3-4-2-1 system. Colombia also had no confirmed injuries or suspensions pre-match, presenting a fully fit squad headlined by Luis Díaz, James Rodríguez, and Luis Suárez — Colombia went on to win 3-1 with goals from Díaz, Campaz, and Muñoz.
